content:
Product: Commercial Equipment Financing

Description: Flexible financing for commercial equipment purchases with competitive rates

Rate Range: 6.5% - 9.5% APR

Term Length: 36 - 60 months
Standard: 48 months

Credit Score Requirements:
- Minimum: 620
- Preferred: 700
- Excellent: 750

Eligible Equipment Types:
• Industrial machinery
• Commercial vehicles
• Manufacturing equipment
• Production lines
• Business equipment

Product: Construction Equipment Leasing

Description: Long-term leasing solutions for construction equipment with predictable costs

Rate Range: 5.5% - 8.5% APR

Term Length: 60 - 84 months
Standard: 72 months

Credit Score Requirements:
- Minimum: 600
- Preferred: 680
- Excellent: 720

Eligible Equipment Types:
• Heavy machinery
• Cranes
• Excavators
• Dozers
• Specialized construction equipment

Product: Used Equipment Purchase Financing

Description: Financing for pre-owned equipment with competitive rates for established businesses

Rate Range: 7.5% - 11.0% APR

Term Length: 24 - 48 months
Standard: 36 months

Credit Score Requirements:
- Minimum: 650
- Preferred: 720
- Excellent: 760

Eligible Equipment Types:
• Pre-owned machinery
• Refurbished equipment
• Secondary market equipment
• Legacy equipment

Credit Score Tier: EXCELLENT

Score Requirement: 750 or higher

Description: Best rates and terms available

Maximum Loan Percentage: 100%

Benefits: N/A

Credit Score Tier: GOOD

Score Requirement: 700 or higher

Description: Competitive rates and favorable terms

Maximum Loan Percentage: 90%

Benefits: N/A

Credit Score Tier: STANDARD

Score Requirement: 620 or higher

Description: Standard rates and terms

Maximum Loan Percentage: 75%

Benefits: N/A

Credit Score Tier: FAIR

Score Requirement: 600 or higher

Description: Higher rates, requires specialist review

Maximum Loan Percentage: 60%

Benefits: N/A

Business Eligibility Requirements:

Years in Business: Minimum N/A years

Annual Revenue: Minimum $N/A

Monthly Revenue: Minimum $N/A

Required Documentation:
None specified
